props.name: triggerVariant
props.description: Visual variant for the trigger Button.

props.name: side
props.description: Which edge the panel is anchored to.

props.name: draggable
props.description: Show a grab handle and enable the drag-to-dismiss gesture. Available on the bottom and lateral sides (ignored on `side="top"`).

props.name: closeLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the close button. Defaults to the i18n catalog's "Close".

props.name: initialFocus
props.description: CSS selector (within the panel) for the element to focus on open — e.g. `"input"` to land on a form's first field instead of the close button.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called whenever the open state changes.
